﻿Dogfood run2 closeout for 2026-05-29:

- Proof artifacts are under `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/` at commit `0ed4498`.
- CI and CodeQL are green on #544.
- Copilot review generated no comments; GraphQL review-thread sweep returned `totalCount: 0`.
- Guard behavior observed: demo emitted `guard.budget_warning`, `guard.budget_exceeded` at `$1.0800 > $1.0000`, `guard.loop_detected`, and `guard.retry_limit_exceeded`; review-loop emitted `guard.budget_exceeded` at `$0.0510 > $0.0450` and `guard.retry_limit_exceeded` for `apply_patch` attempt 4.
- Local validation: focused pytest passed (`35 passed in 1.47s`), `python scripts/sdk_release_guard.py --check-mcp-npm` passed, JSON/JSONL parsing passed, UTF-8/BOM/NUL/local-path hygiene passed, and `git diff --check` was clean.
- Distribution check: GitHub release/PyPI/local SDK remain `1.2.10`, npm/local MCP remain `0.2.2`, Official MCP Registry still reports `0.2.1`, and Glama still returns `tools: []` with env schema present.

Blocked only by required human review.

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

This PR adds a proof-only dogfood run bundle for AgentGuard SDK/MCP local enforcement validation under `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/`.

**Changes:**
- Adds installed CLI and repo-local doctor/demo trace artifacts.
- Records guard-event summaries, report output, and incident output for coding-agent review-loop enforcement.
- Captures package binding, command exit status, and ops staleness evidence tied to issue #473.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 16 out of 17 changed files in this pull request and generated no comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/summary.md` | Summarizes scope, commands, observed guard behavior, artifacts, repo health, and validation. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/staleness.log` | Records ops doc freshness and tracking issue. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/review_loop_stdout.txt` | Captures review-loop example stdout. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/review_loop_incident.md` | Captures generated incident report. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/import_binding.txt` | Records imported SDK path and version. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/guard_events.json` | Aggregates guard and doctor events across traces. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/doctor_trace.jsonl` | Captures installed CLI doctor trace. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/doctor_trace_repo_local.jsonl` | Captures repo-local doctor trace. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/doctor_stdout.json` | Captures installed CLI doctor JSON output. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/doctor_repo_local_stdout.json` | Captures repo-local doctor JSON output. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/demo_trace.jsonl` | Captures installed CLI demo trace. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/demo_trace_repo_local.jsonl` | Captures repo-local demo trace. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/demo_stdout.txt` | Captures installed CLI demo stdout. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/demo_report.txt` | Captures generated demo report output. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/demo_repo_local_stdout.txt` | Captures repo-local demo stdout. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/command_status.txt` | Records base SHA and proof command exit statuses. |
| `proof/dogfood/2026-05-29/run2/coding_agent_review_loop_traces.jsonl` | Captures review-loop enforcement trace events. |
</details>
